mapper.sql: t.id, t.publisher_id, t.title, t.description, t.category, t.location, t.reward, t.deadline_time, t.item_image_url, t.original_price, t.team_total_members, t.team_current_members, t.activity_time, t.activity_note, t.status, t.create_time, t.update_time, t.is_deleted, CASE WHEN t.location_point IS NOT NULL THEN ST_X(t.location_point::geometry) END AS longitude, CASE WHEN t.location_point IS NOT NULL THEN ST_Y(t.location_point::geometry) END AS latitude
CASE t.category WHEN 0 THEN 'EXPRESS' WHEN 1 THEN 'STUDY' WHEN 2 THEN 'SECOND_HAND' WHEN 3 THEN 'TEAM_UP' ELSE 'OTHER' END
CASE WHEN t.status = 1 THEN 'PENDING_CONFIRM' WHEN t.status = 2 THEN 'IN_PROGRESS' WHEN t.status = 3 THEN 'COMPLETED' WHEN t.status = 4 THEN 'CANCELLED' ELSE 'OPEN' END
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_task ( publisher_id, title, description, category, location, location_point, reward, deadline_time, item_image_url, original_price, team_total_members, team_current_members, activity_time, activity_note, status ) VALUES ( #{publisherId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{category}, #{location},
ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326)::geography
NULL
, #{reward}, #{deadlineTime}, #{itemImageUrl}, #{originalPrice}, #{teamTotalMembers}, #{teamCurrentMembers}, #{activityTime}, #{activityNote}, #{status} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_task SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, location = #{location}, location_point =
ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{longitude}, #{latitude}), 4326)::geography
NULL
, reward = #{reward}, deadline_time = #{deadlineTime}, item_image_url = #{itemImageUrl}, original_price = #{originalPrice}, team_total_members = #{teamTotalMembers}, team_current_members = #{teamCurrentMembers}, activity_time = #{activityTime}, activity_note = #{activityNote}, status = #{status}, is_deleted = COALESCE(#{isDeleted}, is_deleted), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = false
UPDATE t_order SET is_deleted = true, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND is_deleted = false
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_task t WHERE t.id = #{taskId} AND t.is_deleted = false LIMIT 1

SELECT t.id AS taskId, t.title, t.description, AS category, AS status, t.reward, t.location, CASE WHEN t.location_point IS NOT NULL THEN ST_X(t.location_point::geometry) END AS longitude, CASE WHEN t.location_point IS NOT NULL THEN ST_Y(t.location_point::geometry) END AS latitude, t.deadline_time AS deadlineTime, t.item_image_url AS itemImageUrl, t.original_price AS originalPrice, t.team_total_members AS teamTotalMembers, t.team_current_members AS teamCurrentMembers, t.activity_time AS activityTime, t.activity_note AS activityNote, u.id AS publisherId, u.nickname AS publisherName, u.avatar_url AS publisherAvatarUrl, u.department AS publisherDepartment, u.credit_score AS publisherCreditScore, COALESCE(f.favorite_count, 0) AS favoriteCount, CASE WHEN tf.id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS favorited, t.create_time AS createdAt, t.update_time AS updatedAt FROM t_task t JOIN u_user u ON u.id = t.publisher_id AND u.is_deleted = false LEFT JOIN ( SELECT task_id, COUNT(*) AS favorite_count FROM t_task_favorite GROUP BY task_id ) f ON f.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN t_task_favorite tf ON tf.task_id = t.id AND tf.user_id = #{viewerId} WHERE t.id = #{taskId} AND t.is_deleted = false LIMIT 1

SELECT t.id AS taskId, t.title, t.description, AS category, AS status, t.reward, t.location, CASE WHEN t.location_point IS NOT NULL THEN ST_X(t.location_point::geometry) END AS longitude, CASE WHEN t.location_point IS NOT NULL THEN ST_Y(t.location_point::geometry) END AS latitude, t.deadline_time AS deadlineTime, t.item_image_url AS itemImageUrl, t.original_price AS originalPrice, t.team_total_members AS teamTotalMembers, t.team_current_members AS teamCurrentMembers, t.activity_time AS activityTime, t.activity_note AS activityNote, u.id AS publisherId, u.nickname AS publisherName, u.avatar_url AS publisherAvatarUrl, u.credit_score AS publisherCreditScore, COALESCE(f.favorite_count, 0) AS favoriteCount, CASE WHEN tf.id IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS favorited, t.create_time AS createdAt, t.update_time AS updatedAt FROM t_task t JOIN u_user u ON u.id = t.publisher_id AND u.is_deleted = false LEFT JOIN ( SELECT task_id, COUNT(*) AS favorite_count FROM t_task_favorite GROUP BY task_id ) f ON f.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN t_task_favorite tf ON tf.task_id = t.id AND tf.user_id = #{viewerId} WHERE t.is_deleted = false
AND t.category = #{category}
AND t.publisher_id = #{publisherId}
AND t.status = 0
AND t.status = 1
AND t.status = 2
AND t.status = 3
AND t.status = 4
AND t.reward > 0
AND t.reward = 0
AND t.location IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(t.location) != ''
AND (t.location IS NULL OR BTRIM(t.location) = '')
AND t.status NOT IN (3, 4)
AND (t.title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.description ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY COALESCE(f.favorite_count, 0) DESC, t.create_time DESC
ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
OFFSET #{offset} LIMIT #{size}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_task t JOIN u_user u ON u.id = t.publisher_id AND u.is_deleted = false WHERE t.is_deleted = false
AND t.category = #{category}
AND t.publisher_id = #{publisherId}
AND t.status = 0
AND t.status = 1
AND t.status = 2
AND t.status = 3
AND t.status = 4
AND t.reward > 0
AND t.reward = 0
AND t.location IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(t.location) != ''
AND (t.location IS NULL OR BTRIM(t.location) = '')
AND t.status NOT IN (3, 4)
AND (t.title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR t.description ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE t_task SET status = #{newStatus}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{taskId} AND is_deleted = false

UPDATE t_task SET team_current_members = team_current_members + 1, status = CASE WHEN team_current_members + 1 >= team_total_members THEN 3 ELSE status END, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{taskId} AND is_deleted = false AND category = 3 AND status = 2 AND team_total_members IS NOT NULL AND team_current_members IS NOT NULL AND team_current_members < team_total_members

UPDATE t_task SET team_current_members = team_current_members - 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{taskId} AND is_deleted = false AND status = 2 AND team_current_members IS NOT NULL AND team_current_members > 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_task WHERE publisher_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_task t JOIN u_user u ON u.id = t.publisher_id AND u.is_deleted = false WHERE t.is_deleted = false AND t.create_time >= CURRENT_DATE) AS todayCreated, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_task t JOIN u_user u ON u.id = t.publisher_id AND u.is_deleted = false WHERE t.is_deleted = false AND t.status = 2) AS inProgress, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_task t JOIN u_user u ON u.id = t.publisher_id AND u.is_deleted = false WHERE t.is_deleted = false AND t.status = 3) AS completed
